sentences.text: Thad and Theo had a thin magnet on the path.
Theo got a thin lever and Thad got the bot.
A thin signal met Thad and Theo at the path.
Thad and Theo fix a thin magnet at the shed.
Theo and Thad lift a thin arm with Beth.
A swift thin lever sat with Thad and Theo.
Thad let Theo set a thin signal on the path.
Theo got a thin hand and Thad got the kit.
A thin magnet hid with Thad, Theo, and Seth.
Thad and Theo fix a thin lever in the shed.
Theo set a thin signal and Thad set the bot.
A thin arm dug past Thad with Theo.
Thad fed a thin hand and Theo had the bot.
Theo and Thad set a thin lever at the shed.
A swift thin signal hid with Thad and Theo.
Thad got a thin magnet and Theo got the cog.
Theo lit a thin lever and Thad had the kit.
A thin hand met Thad, Theo, and Beth.
Thad and Theo had a thin arm in the shed.
Theo cut a thin signal and Thad got the arm.
